metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for the RemotePass design team — design review, UX copy review, handoff readiness, component documentation, and peer review

plugins.name: design-review
plugins.description: Design critique across 4 UX dimensions, plus dedicated UX copy review

plugins.name: design-handoff
plugins.description: Pre-handoff readiness checklist — breakpoints, modes & themes, use cases, system states, DS compliance, changelog

plugins.name: design-system
plugins.description: Component documentation and peer review for the RemotePass design system

plugins.name: design-prep
plugins.description: Pre-design and during-design skills — the toolkit the team reaches for before review and handoff. Currently houses /design-decisions for looking up the team's shared decisions and logging new ones to Notion. Designed to grow with more skills over time (mock data, pattern lookup, override audit, etc.)
